---
title: "Glycoverse Tutorials"
---

These tutorials demonstrate complete glycomics and glycoproteomics analyses
using packages from the [Glycoverse](https://github.com/glycoverse) ecosystem.

## Case studies

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Glycoproteomics](tutorials/glycoproteomics.Rmd)

Import and inspect an experiment, preprocess quantitative data, perform
statistical and functional analyses, and study glycan motifs and derived traits.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### [Glycomics](tutorials/glycomics.Rmd)

Preprocess a glycomics experiment, explore it statistically, and quantify
structural motifs and derived traits.
:::

:::
